Module com.example.battleship

Package com.example.battleship

package com.example.battleship

    Package
    Description
    com.example.battleship.controller

  • Class
    Description
    DemoBattlefield3D
    Demo class: NOT part of the final game.
    DemoShapes3D
    Demo class: NOT part of the final game, it only serves to preview the full fleet (1 aircraft carrier, 2 submarines, 3 destroyers, 4 frigates) already placed on the 3D board, and to visually verify that "hit" and "sunk" marks render correctly.
    Main
    Application entry point.
    SegmentState
    Visual state of an individual segment (cell) of a ship.
